g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do price-based momentum signals work in quant equity?')
sendPrompt('How is fundamental data used in quant signals?')
sendPrompt('How is alternative data like sentiment and web traffic used in quant models?')
sendPrompt('How is options data used to extract signals in systematic strategies?')
sendPrompt('How is macro data used in quant regime models?')
sendPrompt('What feature engineering techniques are used in WorldQuant-style alpha research?')
g.text: Cross-sectional rank · Z-score · winsorise · neutralise sector/market-cap · half-life decay

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Give me examples of WorldQuant alpha expressions and their mathematical form')
g.text: indneutralize(…) · signedpower(…) · decay_linear(…) · Mathematica / GP evolved forms

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do you backtest and screen alphas using IC, Sharpe, and turnover metrics?')
sendPrompt('What is overfitting in quant alpha research and how do you prevent it?')
sendPrompt('What is alpha diversification and how is correlation between signals managed?')
sendPrompt('How does IC-weighted alpha combination and regime-conditional weighting work?')
g.text: w_i = ICIR_i / Σ ICIR_j · regime-conditional reweighting · decay half-life adjustment
→ ranked signal per instrument → portfolio optimiser
